creator: pgiffuni@fps.biblos.unal.edu.co
text:
Please use smrsh in /etc/sendmail.cf as recommended by CERT's directives.

Fix: 

Please add the proper m4 entry for both current and stable.
How-To-Repeat: It will probably be necessary to contact the maintainer of the port(s)
that usually go into the .forward file and to sym link vacation(1).
